sets.instructions_cn: 用 a / an / some / any 填空

steps.hint_cn: apple 以元音音素开头，用 an

steps.base: There is [some] milk in the fridge.
steps.expected: There isn't any milk in the fridge.
steps.hint_cn: 不可数名词在否定句中用 any

steps.cue: 改为一般疑问句，用 any
steps.hint_cn: 疑问句中不可数名词用 any

steps.base: I need [a] egg for the cake.
steps.expected: I need an egg for the cake.
steps.hint_cn: egg 以元音音素开头，用 an

steps.base: There are [some] books on the shelf.
steps.expected: There aren't any books on the shelf.
steps.hint_cn: 可数名词复数在否定句中用 any

sets.instructions_cn: 将句子在单数和复数之间转换

steps.base: There is a cat in the garden.
steps.expected: There are cats in the garden.
steps.hint_cn: 复数用 There are，名词加 -s，去掉 a
可数名词复数加 -s，去掉 a
主语、动词和名词都要改为复数

steps.base: The children are playing in the park.
steps.expected: The child is playing in the park.
steps.hint_cn: children 的单数是 child，are 改为 is

steps.base: There are many people at the station.
steps.expected: There is a person at the station.

sets.instructions_cn: 用量词表达，如 a piece of, a cup of, a bottle of 等

steps.cue: 用量词表达 paper（不可数）
steps.expected: I want a piece of paper.
steps.hint_cn: paper 是不可数名词，用 a piece of

steps.cue: 用量词表达 coffee（不可数）
steps.expected: I would like a cup of coffee.
steps.hint_cn: coffee 是不可数名词，用 a cup of

steps.cue: 用量词表达 water（不可数）
steps.expected: There are two bottles of water in the fridge.
steps.hint_cn: water 不可数，用 two bottles of 表示数量

steps.cue: 用量词表达 bread（不可数）
steps.expected: Please give me three slices of bread.
steps.hint_cn: bread 是不可数名词，用 slices of

steps.base: 我从商店买了一公斤大米。
steps.cue: 用量词表达 rice（不可数）
steps.expected: I bought a kilo of rice from the store.
steps.hint_cn: rice 是不可数名词，用 a kilo of
